global_description: A small, aquatic bird with a compact, rounded body and striking coloration. It features a black head with distinctive golden ear tufts, a red eye, and a slender, pointed black bill. The body is covered in dark plumage with a glossy sheen, and the neck is short and thick.

part_details.head: Black with striking golden ear tufts and a red eye.
part_details.body: Compact, rounded, covered in glossy black plumage.

spatial_relations: The golden ear tufts are positioned on the sides of the black head.
The slender bill extends from the front of the head.
The red eye is set within the black head.
